message.content:
Search the BeFirst_APIs project to understand:

1. How existing services use the ProdMachinesResultsContext (DataMachines context)
2. Find example services that inject and use this context
3. Look at the Service registration pattern in Program.cs for other services (like IStationService, IUnitsService, etc.)
4. Check if there are any existing services that work with AOI data or similar machine data

Focus on finding concrete examples of:
- Service interface definitions
- Service implementations using DbContext
- How services are registered in Program.cs (dependency injection)
- Patterns for CRUD operations with the contexts

Repository: S:\01_Repos\BeFirst_APIs

content.content:
AccountRequest.cs
AOIDataRequest.cs

1→using System.ComponentModel.DataAnnotations;
     2→
     3→namespace APIs_BeFirst.Models.Request
     4→{
     5→    /// <summary>
     6→    /// Request model for AOI (Automated Optical Inspection) machine data submission
     7→    /// </summary>
     8→    public class AOIDataRequest
     9→    {
    10→        [Required]
    11→        public int AOIID { get; set; }
    12→
    13→        [Required]
    14→        public int StationID { get; set; }
    15→
    16→        [Required]
    17→        [StringLength(50)]
    18→        public string PartNumber { get; set; }
    19→
    20→        [Required]
    21→        public int PartID { get; set; }
    22→
    23→        [Required]
    24→        [StringLength(10)]
    25→        public string Side { get; set; }  // e.g., "TOP", "BOTTOM"
    26→
    27→        [Required]
    28→        [StringLength(50)]
    29→        public string SerialNumber { get; set; }
    30→
    31→        [Required]
    32→        public int Position { get; set; }
    33→
    34→        [Required]
    35→        [StringLength(20)]
    36→        public string Result { get; set; }  // e.g., "PASS", "FAIL", "VERIFY"
    37→
    38→        [StringLength(50)]
    39→        public string? Operator { get; set; }
    40→
    41→        public DateTime? InspectionDate { get; set; }
    42→
    43→        public int? DefectCodeID { get; set; }
    44→
    45→        public List<AOIDefectDetail>? Defects { get; set; }
    46→    }
    47→
    48→    /// <summary>
    49→    /// Individual defect details from AOI inspection
    50→    /// </summary>
    51→    public class AOIDefectDetail
    52→    {
    53→        [StringLength(50)]
    54→        public string? Location { get; set; }  // Component reference designator
    55→
    56→        [StringLength(50)]
    57→        public string? PinNumber { get; set; }
    58→
    59→        public decimal? X { get; set; }  // X coordinate
    60→
    61→        public decimal? Y { get; set; }  // Y coordinate
    62→
    63→        [StringLength(100)]
    64→        public string? DefectCode { get; set; }
    65→
    66→        [StringLength(20)]
    67→        public string? UserResult { get; set; }  // Manual review result
    68→    }
    69→}
    70→
